promptDescription: - **crossset** — hierarchical bivariate matrix (CrossSet, IEEE VIS 2025) for jointly exploring two categorical/grouped dimensions at multiple levels of detail. Rows = first-dimension items grouped by a higher-level category; columns = second-dimension items grouped by a higher-level category. The overview shows group×group roll-up totals; clicking any group header expands it to individual items. Best for: product subcategory × territory revenue matrices, customer segment × product category analysis, employee × department cross-tabulations, or any two groupable categorical axes with a numeric measure. IMPORTANT: Use lazy SQL — always embed the SQL as `"sql":"..."` in the spec. Required SQL column aliases: `row_group` (row grouping key, e.g. ProductCategory), `row_label` (individual row item, e.g. ProductSubcategoryName or ProductName), `col_group` (column grouping key, e.g. CountryRegionName or SalesRegion), `col_label` (individual column item, e.g. TerritoryName), `value` (numeric measure, e.g. SUM(LineTotal) or COUNT(*)). Use GROUP BY row_group, row_label, col_group, col_label. Spec: { "type":"crossset", "title":"...", "sql":"SELECT pc.Name AS row_group, psc.Name AS row_label, cr.Name AS col_group, st.Name AS col_label, SUM(sod.LineTotal) AS value FROM ...", "rowDimLabel":"Products", "colDimLabel":"Territories", "valueLabel":"Revenue ($)" }
renderScript:
function(wrap,spec){var PAL=['#f7fbff','#deebf7','#c6dbef','#9ecae1','#6baed6','#4292c6','#2171b5','#08519c','#08306b'];var rows=spec.rows||[];if(!rows.length){wrap.style.cssText='padding:16px;color:#888;font-size:13px';wrap.textContent='CrossSet: no data — need columns: row_group, row_label, col_group, col_label, value';return;}var rgList=[],cgList=[],seenRg={},seenCg={};var rgToRl={},cgToCl={};rows.forEach(function(r){var rg=String(r.row_group!=null?r.row_group:'(none)');var cg=String(r.col_group!=null?r.col_group:'(none)');var rl=String(r.row_label!=null?r.row_label:'');var cl=String(r.col_label!=null?r.col_label:'');if(!seenRg[rg]){seenRg[rg]=1;rgList.push(rg);rgToRl[rg]=[];}if(!seenCg[cg]){seenCg[cg]=1;cgList.push(cg);cgToCl[cg]=[];}if(rgToRl[rg].indexOf(rl)<0)rgToRl[rg].push(rl);if(cgToCl[cg].indexOf(cl)<0)cgToCl[cg].push(cl);});var SEP='\x00';var rlCl={},rgCg={},rgCl={},rlCg={};rows.forEach(function(r){var rg=String(r.row_group!=null?r.row_group:'(none)');var rl=String(r.row_label!=null?r.row_label:'');var cg=String(r.col_group!=null?r.col_group:'(none)');var cl=String(r.col_label!=null?r.col_label:'');var v=+(r.value!=null?r.value:0);rlCl[rl+SEP+cl]=(rlCl[rl+SEP+cl]||0)+v;rgCg[rg+SEP+cg]=(rgCg[rg+SEP+cg]||0)+v;rgCl[rg+SEP+cl]=(rgCl[rg+SEP+cl]||0)+v;rlCg[rl+SEP+cg]=(rlCg[rl+SEP+cg]||0)+v;});var maxVal=1;Object.keys(rlCl).forEach(function(k){if(rlCl[k]>maxVal)maxVal=rlCl[k];});function colorFor(v){if(!v)return'';var t=Math.sqrt(v/maxVal);return PAL[Math.min(Math.floor(t*(PAL.length-1)),PAL.length-1)];}function fgFor(v){return(v/maxVal)>0.55?'#fff':'#222';}function fmt(v){if(v>=1e9)return(v/1e9).toFixed(1)+'B';if(v>=1e6)return(v/1e6).toFixed(1)+'M';if(v>=1e3)return(v/1e3).toFixed(1)+'K';return v%1===0?String(v):v.toFixed(1);}function trunc(s,n){return s.length>n?s.slice(0,n-1)+'…':s;}var expRg={},expCg={};var tt=document.getElementById('__crossset_tt');if(!tt){tt=document.createElement('div');tt.id='__crossset_tt';tt.style.cssText='position:fixed;background:rgba(25,25,25,.92);color:#fff;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .12s;z-index:99999;max-width:260px;';document.body.appendChild(tt);}function showTT(e,html){tt.innerHTML=html;tt.style.opacity='1';posTT(e);}function posTT(e){tt.style.left=(e.clientX+14)+'px';tt.style.top=(e.clientY-44)+'px';}function hideTT(){tt.style.opacity='0';}function render(){wrap.innerHTML='';wrap.style.cssText='overflow:auto;font-size:12px;font-family:var(--font,system-ui,sans-serif);';if(spec.title){var h=document.createElement('div');h.style.cssText='font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text,#333);padding:10px 12px 2px;text-align:center;';h.textContent=spec.title;wrap.appendChild(h);}var hint=document.createElement('div');hint.style.cssText='font-size:10px;color:var(--text3,#aaa);text-align:center;padding:2px 12px 6px;';hint.textContent='▸ Click group headers to expand · '+rgList.length+' row groups × '+cgList.length+' col groups';wrap.appendChild(hint);var scr=document.createElement('div');scr.style.cssText='overflow:auto;';wrap.appendChild(scr);var tbl=document.createElement('table');tbl.style.cssText='border-collapse:collapse;';scr.appendChild(tbl);var colDefs=[];cgList.forEach(function(cg){colDefs.push({type:'group',cg:cg});if(expCg[cg])cgToCl[cg].forEach(function(cl){colDefs.push({type:'item',cg:cg,cl:cl});});});var rowDefs=[];rgList.forEach(function(rg){rowDefs.push({type:'group',rg:rg});if(expRg[rg])rgToRl[rg].forEach(function(rl){rowDefs.push({type:'item',rg:rg,rl:rl});});});var thead=document.createElement('thead');tbl.appendChild(thead);var hr=document.createElement('tr');thead.appendChild(hr);var corner=document.createElement('th');corner.style.cssText='padding:6px 10px;background:var(--bg2,#f3f4f6);border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);text-align:left;color:var(--text2,#888);font-size:10px;font-weight:400;min-width:130px;max-width:180px;white-space:nowrap;';corner.textContent=(spec.rowDimLabel||'Row')+' \ '+(spec.colDimLabel||'Col');hr.appendChild(corner);colDefs.forEach(function(cd){var th=document.createElement('th');if(cd.type==='group'){var isE=!!expCg[cd.cg];th.style.cssText='padding:5px 8px;background:'+(isE?'#dbeafe':'var(--bg2,#f3f4f6)')+';border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;color:var(--text,#333);min-width:64px;max-width:120px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;user-select:none;';th.title=cd.cg+' — click to '+(isE?'collapse':'expand');th.textContent=(isE?'▾ ':'▸ ')+trunc(cd.cg,13);th.addEventListener('click',function(){if(expCg[cd.cg])delete expCg[cd.cg];else expCg[cd.cg]=1;render();});}else{th.style.cssText='padding:3px 4px;background:var(--bg3,#fafafa);border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);min-width:46px;max-width:72px;vertical-align:bottom;';var inner=document.createElement('div');inner.style.cssText='writing-mode:vertical-rl;transform:rotate(180deg);height:54px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2,#666);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;';inner.textContent=trunc(cd.cl,11);inner.title=cd.cl;th.appendChild(inner);}hr.appendChild(th);});var tbody=document.createElement('tbody');tbl.appendChild(tbody);rowDefs.forEach(function(rd){var tr=document.createElement('tr');tbody.appendChild(tr);var rh=document.createElement('th');if(rd.type==='group'){var isE=!!expRg[rd.rg];rh.style.cssText='padding:5px 10px;background:'+(isE?'#dbeafe':'var(--bg2,#f3f4f6)')+';border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;text-align:left;color:var(--text,#333);min-width:130px;max-width:180px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;user-select:none;';rh.title=rd.rg+' — click to '+(isE?'collapse':'expand');rh.textContent=(isE?'▾ ':'▸ ')+trunc(rd.rg,21);rh.addEventListener('click',function(){if(expRg[rd.rg])delete expRg[rd.rg];else expRg[rd.rg]=1;render();});}else{rh.style.cssText='padding:4px 10px 4px 20px;background:var(--bg3,#fafafa);border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);font-size:10px;color:var(--text2,#555);white-space:nowrap;text-align:left;min-width:130px;max-width:180px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;font-weight:400;';rh.title=rd.rl;rh.textContent=trunc(rd.rl,21);}tr.appendChild(rh);colDefs.forEach(function(cd){var td=document.createElement('td');var val=0,tipTitle='',tipSub='';if(rd.type==='group'&&cd.type==='group'){val=rgCg[rd.rg+SEP+cd.cg]||0;tipTitle=rd.rg+' × '+cd.cg;tipSub='('+rgToRl[rd.rg].length+' × '+cgToCl[cd.cg].length+' items)';}else if(rd.type==='group'&&cd.type==='item'){val=rgCl[rd.rg+SEP+cd.cl]||0;tipTitle=rd.rg+' × '+cd.cl;tipSub='('+rgToRl[rd.rg].length+' row items)';}else if(rd.type==='item'&&cd.type==='group'){val=rlCg[rd.rl+SEP+cd.cg]||0;tipTitle=rd.rl+' × '+cd.cg;tipSub='('+cgToCl[cd.cg].length+' col items)';}else{val=rlCl[rd.rl+SEP+cd.cl]||0;tipTitle=rd.rl+' × '+cd.cl;}var bg=val>0?colorFor(val):'var(--bg,#fff)';var fgc=val>0?fgFor(val):'var(--text3,#ccc)';var isAgg=(rd.type==='group'||cd.type==='group');td.style.cssText='padding:3px 6px;border:1px solid var(--border,#e0e0e0);background:'+bg+';color:'+fgc+';text-align:center;min-width:52px;font-weight:'+(isAgg?'600':'400')+';white-space:nowrap;cursor:default;';td.textContent=val>0?fmt(val):'–';var tipHtml=''+tipTitle+''+(tipSub?'
'+tipSub+'':'')+'
'+(spec.valueLabel||'Value')+': '+val.toLocaleString()+'';td.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(e){showTT(e,tipHtml);});td.addEventListener('mousemove',posTT);td.addEventListener('mouseleave',hideTT);tr.appendChild(td);});});var leg=document.createElement('div');leg.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:8px 10px 4px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text2,#888);flex-wrap:wrap;';var ll=document.createElement('span');ll.textContent='Low ';leg.appendChild(ll);PAL.forEach(function(c){var s=document.createElement('span');s.style.cssText='display:inline-block;width:16px;height:10px;background:'+c+';border:1px solid #ccc;';leg.appendChild(s);});var lh=document.createElement('span');lh.textContent=' High';leg.appendChild(lh);var lhint=document.createElement('span');lhint.style.cssText='margin-left:12px;color:var(--text3,#aaa);';lhint.textContent='(sqrt-scaled, item-level cells only)';leg.appendChild(lhint);scr.appendChild(leg);}render();}
